author_revisions_made.disposition: Explicitly mark the realization partial and defer both concepts unless new claims complete the accepted lifecycle.
author_revisions_made.summary: Event-notification strategy and Control Tower have no approved claims in this baseline, but the lesson set did not explicitly disposition those omissions and could be read as complete SAP-ORG-04 teaching.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Use bounded administrative responsibility language and remove the unsupported universal sentence.
author_revisions_made.summary: Approved evidence supports service-specific administrative capabilities, not transfer of service ownership or a universal cross-service configuration/Region/evidence proposition.
The approved account-access claim requires an organization instance; account instances do not support account access.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Explicitly state that SCPs do not affect service-linked roles.
author_revisions_made.summary: The circular subject-to-SCP qualifier does not teach the approved decision-relevant service-linked-role exclusion.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Project exact applicable locators from the approved claim source references.
author_revisions_made.summary: The learner citation projection discards the precise approved claim-level locator.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Project exact applicable locators from the approved claim source references.
author_revisions_made.summary: The learner citation projection discards the precise approved claim-level locator.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Project exact applicable locators from the approved claim source references.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Project exact applicable locators from the approved claim source references.
author_revisions_made.summary: The learner citation projection discards the precise approved claim-level locator.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Project exact applicable locators from the approved claim source references.
author_revisions_made.summary: The learner citation projection discards the precise approved claim-level locator.

author_revisions_made.disposition: State that the configured organization trail's delivery prerequisites are validated.
author_revisions_made.summary: Trail creation can coexist with destination-validation failures, so the usable central record requires an explicit validated-delivery condition.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Make an already valid Organizations-backed aggregator an explicit scenario condition and ask the learner to use it, not create it.
author_revisions_made.summary: Creating an organization aggregator in an arbitrary member account has authority and role prerequisites not covered by the approved claim bank.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Remove req-delegation from option A's rationale and leave service-specific delegation to option B.
author_revisions_made.summary: The rationale credits option A with delegation while the matrix marks delegation not applicable.

author_revisions_made.disposition: State that an organization instance is enabled.
author_revisions_made.summary: Cross-account assignments require an IAM Identity Center organization instance.

author_revisions_made.disposition: State that the supported resource type permits sharing to Organizations OU principals.
author_revisions_made.summary: Generic RAM support does not necessarily establish support for an OU principal.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Narrow the scenario to IAM users and roles subject to SCPs and explicitly exclude service-linked roles.
author_revisions_made.summary: Service-linked roles are not subject to SCPs, so principals is overbroad.

author_revisions_made.disposition: State that every intended home and linked Region is enabled in every target account.
author_revisions_made.summary: An opt-in linked Region must be enabled in a target account before policy application.

identified_concerns.disposition: Accepted and revised; the immutable response record identifies the old and new exact digests.
